content_fingerprint: deepseek v4 brings one million token context window to agent workflows deepseek v4 s expanded context window up to one million tokens promises to let ai agents work with entire codebases or long document collections without the fragmentation that plagues shorter context models deepseek has released details on version 4 of its flagship model a highlight of which is a native context window of one million tokens that is roughly equivalent to reading a 750 000 word document or several large code repositories in a single inference pass without relying on chunking or summarization workarounds that c
